calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-341 P3 behavioural falsifier 3-arm on SD-056-amended substrate (supersedes V3-EXQ-614a; B_only / ablate_B / ALL_ON)
items.note: Behavioural successor to V3-EXQ-614a (PASS 2026-05-30T19:32Z, interpretation_label PASS_C2_C3_only_mech341_load_bearing_in_stack_only) routed by the SD-056 multi-step rollout stability amend (ree-v3 main d327b89, 2026-05-31T11:25Z) + V3-EXQ-617 substrate-readiness PASS 11:31Z. Re-runs the 3-arm MECH-341 P3 falsifier (ARM_0 B_only / ARM_1 ablate_B / ARM_2 ALL_ON) on the SD-056-amended substrate. Five SD-056 amend lever flags applied UNIFORMLY across all 3 arms (held constant on the diversity-axis comparison so R2.c interpretation is not confounded): e2_action_contrastive_multistep_enabled=True (Lever (a); h=5), e2_rollout_output_norm_clamp_enabled=True (Lever (b); ratio=2.0), e2_action_contrastive_enabled=True + weight=0.01 (t=1 contrastive ON; substrate default OFF). User-confirmed scope 2026-05-31T12:31Z via AskUserQuestion. Acceptance criteria UNCHANGED vs 614a: C1 R2.c MECH-341 isolation entropy_nats > 0.3 + n_classes >= 2 on >= 2/3 seeds; C2 ablate_B necessity entropy delta >= 0.1; C3 Rung-1 ALL_ON works on >= 2/3 seeds; PASS = C1 fires OR (C2 AND C3) fires; FAIL = neither. 4-row interpretation grid copied verbatim from 614a + header note clarifying that under the amended substrate PASS via C1 is now the load-bearing target (614a established PASS via C2+C3); if 614b lands PASS via C2+C3 only again, route as substrate-stable-but-isolation-still-not-clearing under the same R2.c-isolation-deferred reading (Q-054 entropy_bias_scale sweep + stratified_temperature revisit, NOT fresh /diagnose-errors loop). env_kwargs IDENTICAL to V3-EXQ-611/611c/614a (SD-054 reef-bipartite + hazard_food_attraction + harm_history) for direct manifest comparability. claim_ids=[MECH-341, ARC-065] per claim_ids accuracy rule (science identical to 614a; only substrate amended underneath). Smoke 2026-05-31T12:40Z dry-run (3 arms x 1 seed x P0=2 + P1=2 ep x 30 steps): all 3 arms boot + verdict PASS + manifest+sentinel emit_outcome fired; dry-run outcome FAIL expected at minimum budget. validate_experiments AST PASS; ASCII-clean. Cross-plan: same Layer-B substrate stabilisation unblocks arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B (V3-EXQ-543l successor cohort) under shared SD-056-amended substrate. Sibling concurrent claim queue-experiment-v3-exq-569a-arc-065-gap-a-r1b-20260531T123128Z (ARC-065 GAP-A) holds disjoint script path; coordinated via re-read-before-write per user-approved protocol.

items.title: Q-054 entropy_bias_scale sweep on MECH-341 B_only isolation arm (4 scales x 3 seeds)
items.note: Routed from V3-EXQ-614a PASS_via_C2_C3 interpretation grid (2026-05-30 PASS) + 2026-05-31T08:45Z governance walk routing Q-054 entropy_bias_scale sweep here per behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md R2.c rule. 4-arm sweep: entropy_bias_scale={1.0, 2.0, 4.0, 8.0} on B_only isolation (SP-CEM OFF, MECH-341 ON both sub-flavours, MECH-313 OFF, V_s OFF). Env IDENTICAL to V3-EXQ-611/611c/614a (SD-054 bipartite reef + hazard_food_attraction + harm_history). Per-arm acceptance: 614a C1 R2.c (>=2/3 seeds: n_classes>=2 AND entropy>0.3 nats AND frac_pre_ge2>=0.5). Cross-arm outcome: PASS = lowest passing scale identifies the load-bearing floor; FAIL = scale lever insufficient in isolation under max scale 8.0. claim_ids=[Q-054, MECH-341] with per-claim direction per script interpretation grid (floor=1.0/2.0 -> both supports; floor=4.0/8.0 -> MECH-341 mixed (default too low) + Q-054 supports; FAIL -> both mixed). experiment_purpose=evidence (Q-054 answer-state proposal EXP-0273 / EVB-0284). Smoke 2026-05-31T11:10Z dry-run: 4 arms x 1 seed PASS end-to-end (boots, verdict lines printed, manifest+sentinel emit_outcome fired; dry-run outcome FAIL expected at minimum budget). validate_experiments AST PASS; ASCII-clean. Pathspec-limited queue append concurrent with IGW-028 ARC-065 retest claim (disjoint scientific scope; ARC-065 pending_retest cleared 08:45Z).

items.title: MECH-090 R-c commit-entry readiness conjunction validation (4-arm; supersedes V3-EXQ-592c)
items.note: MECH-090 R-c commit-entry readiness conjunction validation, expanded 4-arm successor to V3-EXQ-592b/c (both 2-arm; both FAIL on a script that exercised only the within-tick score_margin axis -- 592b DLAPTOP 2026-05-29, 592c ree-cloud-3 2026-05-30). 592d adds the across-tick motor-program readiness axis (landed 2026-05-29 as ree_core/policy/commit_readiness.py + REEConfig use_mech090_readiness_conjunction master + AND-composition at both elevate sites in agent.py select_action). FIRST-EVER validation of the nav_competence axis. Arm matrix (4 arms x 3 seeds = 12 cells): ARM_0 BASELINE_BOTH_OFF (use_commit_readiness_gate=False, use_mech090_readiness_conjunction=False) -- pure legacy rv-only commit entry, reference baseline for commit-rate / false-commit-rate / time-to-commit. ARM_1 SCORE_MARGIN_ONLY (use_commit_readiness_gate=True floor=0.05) -- within-tick decisiveness axis alone, replicates 592b/c substrate at full 4-arm context. ARM_2 NAV_COMPETENCE_ONLY (use_mech090_readiness_conjunction=True floor=0.3 initial=0.0) -- across-tick motor-program readiness axis alone, initial=0.0 fail-closed start so the gate has the opportunity to block (default 1.0 fail-open would make the gate permanently admit absent harness push). ARM_3 BOTH_GATES_ON (both axes active, intended-production config). Curriculum: matched to V3-EXQ-592c (P0 warmup on EASY env size=10 / 2 hazards / 2 resources / tolerance_frac=0.30, budget=400 ep x 200 step; P2 frozen-policy eval on TARGET env size=10 / 4 hazards / 3 resources / tolerance_frac=0.15, 50 ep x 200 step). ARM_2 / ARM_3 push nav_competence_proxy = clip([0,1], 1.0 - rv/commit_threshold) via agent.commit_readiness.notify_outcome AFTER every P2 env.step (custom P2 inner loop in script -- substrate Phase 1 does not auto-wire notify_outcome from env). Metrics: per-arm-per-seed total_committed_steps / n_commit_entries / n_commit_blocks_score_margin / n_commit_blocks_nav_competence / mean_time_to_commit / false_commit_rate (commit fired while rv<threshold AND proxy<0.3 -- V3-EXQ-592-seed-42 degenerate signature) / final_readiness / final_rv / mean_p2_hold_rate. Per-arm aggregate: commit_rate_across_seeds, false_commit_rate_across_seeds, time_to_commit_p50_p90. Acceptance: C1 ARM_0 commit_rate > 0.001 (baseline fires) / C2 ARM_1 false_rate < ARM_0 false_rate * 0.7 (score_margin discriminates) / C3 ARM_2 blocks_nav >= 1 AND ARM_2 commit_rate < ARM_0 commit_rate (nav_competence fires) / C4 ARM_3 false_rate < 0.10 AND ARM_3 commit_rate > 0 (conjunction suppresses degenerate without lock-out). PASS = C1 AND (C2 OR C3) AND C4. 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring: PASS -> R-c validated, commitment_closure:GAP-4 substrate_landed_pending_validation -> done substrate-side, queue *b cohort (V3-EXQ-460b/461/463b/464b/466b/467b/468b); C1 FAIL -> /diagnose-errors on curriculum (test setup broken); C2 PASS+C3 FAIL -> nav_competence-only diagnostic with floor sweep {0.5, 0.7, 0.9}; C2 FAIL+C3 PASS -> score_margin-only diagnostic with floor sweep {0.01, 0.02, 0.05, 0.10}; All FAIL -> R-c retest via /diagnose-errors on agent.py flag propagation. claim_ids=[MECH-090] only (single-claim per CLAUDE.md claim_ids Accuracy Rule -- SD-034/MECH-266/267/268 are transitively unblocked by GAP-4 substrate completion but not directly tested by this substrate-readiness diagnostic; cross-claim governance evidence comes from the *b cohort behavioural arms queued post-PASS). experiment_purpose=diagnostic (substrate-readiness; NOT standalone governance evidence). Smoke 2026-05-31T13:08Z dry-run (4 arms x 1 seed x 5 ep P0 + 2 ep P2 x 20 steps): 4/4 arm verdicts PASS, all arms boot + emit progress prints (ep N/M denominator=p0_budget loop var, Seed/Condition boundary lines, verdict per cell), ARM_2/ARM_3 blocks_nav=6 confirming nav_competence gate fires under failclosed initial=0.0 + per-tick proxy push; counter-accumulation fix verified (BetaGate / CommitReadiness reset() clears counters per-episode; script accumulates per-episode deltas instead of pre/post-P2 snapshot). validate_experiments.py AST PASS; ASCII-clean. machine_affinity=DLAPTOP-4.local (Mac CPU fastest for online stepping; 592b/c precedent). Budget: 4 arms x 3 seeds x (P0=400 + P2=50 ep) x ~0.1 min/ep on Mac = ~270 min worst-case + curriculum-harness overhead -> 450 min. Pathspec-limited queue append (concurrent SD-049 Phase 3 session edits agent.py + config.py on disjoint code paths; concurrent ARC-065 GAP-A + MECH-341 GAP-B queue entries kept; working-tree-vs-HEAD audit confirmed no foreign queue entries before append). Cross-link IGW-20260531-021. Predecessor synthesis: REE_assembly/evidence/literature/targeted_review_connectome_mech_090/synthesis.md commit 9e68c5ca8a.
